# This directory holds trained model files (.pkl)
# Generated by: python ml/train.py
# 
# Files created after training:
#   - aapt_model.pkl        (the ensemble model)
#   - feature_names.pkl     (list of feature column names)
#   - model_metadata.json   (accuracy, F1, training date)
#   - scaler.pkl            (fitted StandardScaler)
#   - encoders.pkl          (fitted LabelEncoder + column info)
